(AH) You witnessed an accident on your way to school this moming. Based on the
newspaper article given below, write an email of about 60 to 80 words to your
older sister, telling her what happened and how you felt about the incident. gs

Motorcyclist Injured in Early Moming Collision
Kuala Lumpur, 5 June — A motorcyclist was seriously injured in an accident that
occurred at around 7.15 a.m. near the junction of Jalan Tun Razak and Jalan
Ampang.

According to eyewitnesses, a car suddenly swerved to avoid a pothole and
collided with a passing motorbike. The motorcyclist, believed to be in his late
twenties, was thrown off his bike and landed on the pavement.

Several passersby rushed to help and called for an ambulance. Emergency
services arrived within minutes, and the victim was taken to Hospital Kuala Lumpur
for treatment. The car driver was not injured but appeared shaken.

Police are currently investigating the cause of the accident. Motorists are advised
fo drive cautiously, especially during peak hours when the roads are busiest.

(FP Read the adventure blog. Then, answer the following questions.
ADVENTURES OF A THRILL SEEKER
AboutAaron : Gallery
+ sora Ph | JULY Sc SH a EL ban
About Universal Studios Beijing
Universal Studios Beijing Resort opened in late September 2021. It's huge and has
seven themed zones. You can take the Beijing Subway, Batong Line 7 to Universal
Resort Station.
My review
It was an A-MAZING experience! I managed to visit The Wizarding World of Harry
Potter, Minion Land, Jurassic World and Transformers Metrobase. The best ride
for me was the Transformers Decepticoaster. It's a roller-coaster ride with special
effects and lighting. You get to zoom up and down and in and out of a cave! Thrilling!
The Harry Potter and The Forbidden Journey ride was fun as well. Lots of climbing,
stopping and dropping! I got a bit light-headed after the ride. After resting, we went
around looking for a drink. I tried butterbeer (it's non-alcoholic, by the way), and it
tasted like butterscotch and caramel. Yummy! Check out my gallery for photos and
vids!
Tips
« Purchase your tickets online to avoid queuing up.
» Wear suitable shoes (sneakers) and comfortable clothes (T-shirts and jeans).
« Food is expensive, so pack snacks if you want to save some pennies.
* Remember, mask up if there's a crowd. Covid-19 is still hovering among us.

have just as much fun as you!
